Join the XLM Airdrop on StellarX!

We are excited to announce a special XLM airdrop event on StellarX! This event is organized to boost engagement and encourage transactions within our platform. You can participate in the XLM airdrop, and the amount you receive depends on the on-chain activity in your wallet, so be sure to participate actively.

Join now and claim your XLM!

Earn interest on StellarX

To earn on your assets, you need to provide liquidity to any pools with attractive APYs. Liquidity providers collect extra rewards after locking assets in pools.

Buy crypto

Purchase Bitcoin, XLM, Ethereum, Litecoin and other cryptocurrencies using your Master Card, Visa, or Apple Pay, instantly and with low fees.

Buy Lumens Buy Bitcoin Buy others

Swap Assets

Exchange any amount of assets at the best rates. There’s no one in the middle. You always have sole control of your assets.

Deposit and withdraw, fiat and crypto

You can move your funds in and out right from our app. Convert fiat tokens to money in your bank account. Swap crypto tokens for their native coins. All from your wallet.

Start earning today
